channel.title: Project DFCris on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Project DFCris on CEDIS

item.title: Project DFCris
item.description: A research project in partnership with IBICT and funded by FAP/DF.

item.title: People
item.description: Full Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program and the Graduate Program in Applied Computing.

item.title: Products
item.description: The app and site Contextus redefines scientific analysis with NLP and ML for direct interaction with academic knowledge.

item.title: People
item.description: Adjunct Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program and the Graduate Program in Applied Computing.

item.title: People
item.description: Undergraduate in Software Engineering, University of Brasília

item.title: People
item.description: Undergraduate in Computing, Federal Institute of Education, Science, and Technology of Southern Minas Gerais

item.title: People
item.description: Undergraduate in Computer Science, Federal Institute of Education, Science, and Technology of Ceará

item.title: Contextus software registration is granted by INPI
item.description: The Contextus certificate was issued on February 18, 2026, formalizing the software's legal protection before INPI.

item.title: CEDIS Launches Contextus Software
item.description: Contextus - An advanced AI, NLP, and ML platform at the heart of Scientific Analysis, led by CEDIS.
